prompt: Create a dramatic vertical black-and-white fine-art photograph of a young woman with long windblown dark hair standing in a grassy field under a stormy cloudy sky, wearing a flowing off-the-shoulder black sheer gown. She is shown in left profile, waist-up to full-length, gently reaching her right hand up to touch the muzzle of a large black horse entering from the upper right side of the frame. The horse’s head and neck dominate the top-right composition, mane blowing in the wind, ears visible, eye partially in shadow, lowering its face toward the woman in an intimate quiet moment. The woman gazes upward at the horse with a calm, tender expression; her bare shoulders and soft posture create an elegant silhouette. Use a moody low-key monochrome palette with deep blacks, soft gray midtones, strong atmospheric contrast, and subtle film grain. Background should be out-of-focus open field and layered clouds, with no buildings, fences, text, or extra animals. Composition: vertical portrait orientation, subject placed slightly left of center, horse cropped by the right and top edges, lots of negative space in the cloudy sky, cinematic natural light, wind-swept romantic gothic mood, realistic photography, shallow depth of field, high detail in hair, fabric, and horse mane.
promptEn: Create a dramatic vertical black-and-white fine-art photograph of a young woman with long windblown dark hair standing in a grassy field under a stormy cloudy sky, wearing a flowing off-the-shoulder black sheer gown. She is shown in left profile, waist-up to full-length, gently reaching her right hand up to touch the muzzle of a large black horse entering from the upper right side of the frame. The horse’s head and neck dominate the top-right composition, mane blowing in the wind, ears visible, eye partially in shadow, lowering its face toward the woman in an intimate quiet moment. The woman gazes upward at the horse with a calm, tender expression; her bare shoulders and soft posture create an elegant silhouette. Use a moody low-key monochrome palette with deep blacks, soft gray midtones, strong atmospheric contrast, and subtle film grain. Background should be out-of-focus open field and layered clouds, with no buildings, fences, text, or extra animals. Composition: vertical portrait orientation, subject placed slightly left of center, horse cropped by the right and top edges, lots of negative space in the cloudy sky, cinematic natural light, wind-swept romantic gothic mood, realistic photography, shallow depth of field, high detail in hair, fabric, and horse mane.
promptZh: 创作一张极具戏剧张力的竖构图黑白艺术摄影作品，画面中一位 留着长发、发丝在风中飘动的年轻女子 站在暴风雨云层下的草地上，身穿一件 飘逸的露肩黑色透视礼服。画面采用左侧侧面视角，从腰部到全身构图，她轻轻抬起右手，触碰一匹从画面右上角进入的 高大的黑马 的口鼻部。马的头部和颈部占据了构图的右上角，鬃毛在风中飞扬，耳朵清晰可见，眼睛部分处于阴影中，它低下头朝向女子，营造出一种亲密而静谧的瞬间。女子抬头凝视着马，表情平静而温柔；她裸露的肩膀和柔和的姿态勾勒出优雅的轮廓。采用忧郁的低调黑白影调，强调深邃的黑色、柔和的灰色中间调、强烈的氛围对比以及细腻的胶片颗粒感。背景应为失焦的开阔原野和层叠的云层，画面中不应包含任何建筑物、围栏、文字或其他动物。构图：竖向肖像构图，主体略微偏左，马匹在右侧和顶部边缘进行裁剪，多云的天空留出大量负空间，采用电影般的自然光，营造出风中摇曳的浪漫哥特氛围，写实摄影风格，浅景深，头发、织物和马鬃细节丰富。
